changes.title: Rank label on messages
changes.description: If a user has rankLabel set in their appearance.json, a styled tag appears inline with their sender name. The tag uses rankColor for text color, with a dark translucent pill background and subtle border. Labels appear immediately for cached appearance data; cache warming (via createMessageElement fire-and-forget + stale refresh) ensures they populate on subsequent renders.

changes.title: Badge icon on messages
changes.description: If a user has badge set to a non-none BADGE_REGISTRY entry (dot, star, crown, verified, flame, heart, diamond), the corresponding icon character is shown after their sender name. Badge color is driven by badgeTint from appearance.json; defaults to currentColor at 70% opacity if unset.

changes.title: _propagateAppearanceChange DOM update (badge + rank)
changes.description: When appearance is committed or loaded, _propagateAppearanceChange now queries all visible .msg-sender-name[data-uid] elements, removes stale .msg-badge and .msg-rank elements, and re-injects fresh ones from the updated appearance cache. This enables real-time badge/rank updates without a page reload.
